title: IT Test Manager / Lead (Test Planning / Strategy / Banking)
description:
Executive Summary

Smart IMS Inc provides Digital technology & Cloud transformation services, Application & Infrastructure Management Services, Unified Communications and Insurance implementation services to customers across the Americas, Europe, Middle East, and Asia-Pacific regions. As the trusted technology and business partner of leading MNCs, including Global Investment Banks, Smart IMS is also a Microsoft Gold Certified Partner, Oracle Platinum Partner and AWS MSP Partner.

We are seeking an experienced IT Test Manager / Lead with strong QA/QC expertise and proven leadership in managing high-performing testing teams. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience in test planning, test design, test execution, and defect management within Agile environments—preferably in the banking or financial services domain.

Responsibilities:

  • Perform detailed analysis on requirements and perform break-down to create Test flows/Test Scenarios.
  • Create Test Flows (impacting/pass-through applications) & Test Scenarios / Test cases from requirement.
  • Ensure steps in test cases are clearly document and capture necessary validation steps for impacting application(s).
  • Create & own Master Test Plan and ensure it is periodically updated with necessary information on confluence.
  • Create Test cases in Jira and execute the same during execution phase / sprint.
  • Any defects identified during testing should be validated and recorded as Bug in Jira. Ensure that defects are not created for Test data discrepancy.
  • Create and manage test data and/or ensure partner applications are informed of test data needs.
  • Raise requests & secure access for all necessary/required applications for testing simulations.
  • Ensure 100% clarity is ascertained while document test-cases, no assumptions. If there is need for assumption, it should be document/called out & validated with PM/TDM.
  • Create document on all KTs being received or exclusive information from other clearings/partner applications, which can be used for future testing's.
  • Engage with service provider test/development teams as necessary & understand process, validate test-cases.
  • Follow standard Testing and defect management guidelines, clarify when in doubt, follow Agile environment and principles.
  • Ensure that representation on project calls is balanced with no impact to project deliverables and timelines. Any clash between deliverable & project call should be announced in advance.

Requirements:

  • Have at least 6 years of experience in software testing and QA/QC, with at least 4 years in a Test Manager or Lead role.
  • Strong leadership skills with past experience managing a testing team
  • Strong understanding of end-to-end testing, test design techniques, regression testing, and integration testing.
  • Proficiency with JIRA, Confluence, and test management tools.
  • Strong communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to manage expectations across cross-functional teams.
  • Preferably possess relevant testing experience in Banking domain
  • Past experience in payments or ISO 20022 related projects will be an advantage

postedCompany.description:
About the Company:


Smart IMS delivers IT solutions that create a sustainable competitive advantage for its clients across the world. The company was founded by business and technology experts with extensive backgrounds in designing, implementing, and managing large and complex IT projects at Fortune 500 companies.


We are a Cisco and Microsoft Gold certified Partner, specializing in providing end-to-end Infrastructure Management Services (Network, Security, VOIP, Systems, Databases and Applications) across the Globe.


Our core portfolio includes IT applications, business process services, and IT transformation services. We leverage our deep industry and functional expertise, leading technology practices, and an advanced global delivery model to help clients transform their highest-value business processes and improve their business performance.


Smart IMS is headquartered in Plainsboro, New Jersey (US), with offices in India, Singapore, Sydney, and Dubai. Our Global Delivery Center is located in Hyderabad, India and is a state-of-the art facility designed to accommodate up to 500 employees. It was built using best-of-breed products and solutions from global leaders such as Cisco, HP, Sun, IBM, Oracle, and Microsoft. The high-end configuration infrastructure, built using a fiber-optic backbone, enables high-speed communication links with all our offices and client sites.


Smart IMS deploys a global delivery model at the heart of its business operations, leveraging people and infrastructure in different global locations.


• Cloud Transformation – IoT, Big Data, ML/AI, Migration


• Enterprise Application - Microsoft Dynamics 365 / AX / CRM & Salesforce & Oracle & SAP & Guidewire


• Infrastructure Engineering – SDN -WAN, SBC, RMM


• Unified Communication – Voice & Data (MS Teams), Contact Center


• Application Development & Management


• Managed Services – 24/7 in different time zone

• 

Professional Staff Augmentation Services – Onsite/Offshore
